016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.time.*;
025import java.time.temporal.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Session for serializing objects to Hjson format.
037 */
038@SuppressWarnings({
039   "resource", "java:S110", "java:S115", "java:S3776", "java:S6541",
040   "rawtypes", "unchecked"
041})
042public class HjsonSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
043
044   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
045
046   /**
047    * Builder for Hjson serializer session.
048    */
049   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
050
051      private HjsonSerializer ctx;
052
053      protected Builder(HjsonSerializer ctx) {
054         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
055         this.ctx = ctx;
056      }
057
058      @Override
059      public HjsonSerializerSession build() {
060         return new HjsonSerializerSession(this);
061      }
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Creates a session builder.
066    *
067    * @param ctx The serializer context.
068    * @return The builder.
069    */
070   public static Builder create(HjsonSerializer ctx) {
071      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
072   }
073
074   private final HjsonSerializer ctx;
075
076   protected HjsonSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
077      super(builder);
078      ctx = builder.ctx;
079   }
080
081   @Override /* RecordWritable */
082   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
083      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
084   }
085
086   @Override /* RecordWritable */
087   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
088      return false;
089   }
090
091   protected final HjsonWriter getHjsonWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
092      var output = out.getRawOutput();
093      if (output instanceof HjsonWriter w)
094         return w;
095      var w = new HjsonWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(),
096         ctx.useNewlineSeparators, ctx.useQuotelessStrings, ctx.useQuotelessKeys, ctx.omitRootBraces,
097         ctx.useMultilineStrings, isUseWhitespace(), getUriResolver());
098      out.setWriter(w);
099      return w;
100   }
101
102   @Override
103   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
104      if (o == null)
105         return;
106      var aType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
107      var eType = getExpectedRootType(o);
108      var hw = getHjsonWriter(out).i(getInitialDepth());
109      // Apply object swap before type check (e.g., surrogate serializers convert D1 → D2).
110      ClassMeta<?> sType = aType;
111      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
112      if (nn(swap)) {
113         o = swap(swap, o);
114         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
115         if (sType.isObject())
116            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
117      }
118      if (sType.isBean() || sType.isMap()) {
119         var omitRoot = ctx.omitRootBraces;
120         if (sType.isBean())
121            serializeBeanMap(hw, toBeanMap(o), getBeanTypeName(this, eType, sType, null), omitRoot);
122         else
123            serializeMap(hw, (Map) o, eType, omitRoot);
124      } else {
125         serializeAnything(hw, o, eType, "root", null);
126      }
127   }
128
129   private void serializeBeanMap(HjsonWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName, boolean omitBraces) throws SerializeException {
130      var i = indent;
131      out.objectStart(omitBraces, i);
132      indent++;
133      var first = Flag.create();
134      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
135
136      if (nn(typeName)) {
137         var pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
138         writeKey(out, pm.getName(), i, first);
139         serializeString(out, typeName);
140         first.set();
141      }
142
143      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
144         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
145         if (nn(thrown))
146            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
147         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
148            return;
149         writeKey(out, key, i, first);
150         serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta);
151         first.set();
152      });
153
154      indent--;
155      out.objectEnd(omitBraces, indent);
156   }
157
158   private void writeKey(HjsonWriter out, Object key, int depth, Flag first) throws SerializeException {
159      if (first.isSet())
160         out.memberSeparator(depth);
161      else
162         out.cr(depth);
163      var keyStr = toString(key);
164      if (out.needsQuoting(keyStr))
165         out.quotedString(keyStr);
166      else
167         out.quotelessString(keyStr);
168      out.keyValueSeparator();
169   }
170
171   private void serializeMap(HjsonWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> type, boolean omitBraces) throws SerializeException {
172      var i = indent;
173      out.objectStart(omitBraces, i);
174      indent++;
175      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
176      var valueType = type.getValueType();
177      var first = Flag.create();
178
179      forEachEntry(m, x -> {
180         var value = x.getValue();
181         var key = generalize(x.getKey(), keyType);
182         writeKey(out, key, i, first);
183         serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, key == null ? null : toString(key), null);
184         first.set();
185      });
186
187      indent--;
188      out.objectEnd(omitBraces, indent);
189   }
190
191   private void serializeCollection(HjsonWriter out, Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
192      var eType = type.getElementType();
193      out.arrayStart();
194      indent++;
195      var first = Flag.create();
196      forEachEntry(c, x -> {
197         if (first.isSet())
198            out.memberSeparator(indent);
199         else
200            out.cr(indent);
201         serializeAnything(out, x, eType, "<iterator>", null);
202         first.set();
203      });
204      indent--;
205      out.arrayEnd();
206   }
207
208   private void serializeString(HjsonWriter out, String s) throws SerializeException {
209      if (s == null) {
210         out.w("null");
211         return;
212      }
213      if (ctx.useMultilineStrings && s.contains("\n"))
214         out.multilineString(s);
215      else if (out.isSimpleValue(s))
216         out.quotelessString(s);
217      else
218         out.quotedString(s);
219   }
220
221   protected HjsonWriter serializeAnything(HjsonWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
222      if (o == null) {
223         out.w("null");
224         return out;
225      }
226      if (eType == null)
227         eType = object();
228
229      var aType = push2(attrName, o, eType);
230      var isRecursion = aType == null;
231
232      if (aType == null) {
233         o = null;
234         aType = object();
235      }
236
237      if (isOptional(aType)) {
238         o = getOptionalValue(o);
239         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
240         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
241      }
242
243      var sType = aType;
244      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
245      if (nn(swap)) {
246         o = swap(swap, o);
247         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
248         if (sType.isObject())
249            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
250      }
251
252      if (o == null || (sType.isChar() && ((Character) o).charValue() == 0)) {
253         out.w("null");
254      } else if (sType.isBean()) {
255         serializeBeanMap(out, toBeanMap(o), getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta), false);
256      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
257         if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
258            serializeBeanMap(out, o2, getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta), false);
259         else
260            serializeMap(out, (Map) o, eType, false);
261      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
262         serializeCollection(out, (Collection) o, eType);
263      } else if (sType.isArray()) {
264         serializeCollection(out, toList(sType.inner(), o), eType);
265      } else if (sType.isNumber() || sType.isBoolean()) {
266         out.append(o);
267      } else if (sType.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri())) {
268         serializeString(out, getUriResolver().resolve(o));
269      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
270         serializeString(out, serializeDate((Date)o, sType));
271      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
272         serializeString(out, serializeCalendar(o, sType));
273      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
274         serializeString(out, serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)o, sType));
275      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
276         var value = serializeDuration((Duration)o);
277         if (getDurationFormat().isNumeric())
278            out.append(value);
279         else
280            serializeString(out, value);
281      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
282         serializeString(out, serializePeriod((Period)o));
283      } else if (sType.isStreamable()) {
284         serializeStreamable(out, o, sType, eType);
285      } else if (sType.isReader()) {
286         pipe((Reader) o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
287      } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
288         pipe((InputStream) o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
289      } else {
290         serializeString(out, toString(o));
291      }
292
293      if (!isRecursion)
294         pop();
295      return out;
296   }
297
298   private void serializeStreamable(HjsonWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
299      var eType = type.getElementType();
300      out.arrayStart();
301      indent++;
302      var first = Flag.create();
303      forEachStreamableEntry(o, sType, x -> {
304         if (first.isSet())
305            out.memberSeparator(indent);
306         else
307            out.cr(indent);
308         serializeAnything(out, x, eType, "<iterator>", null);
309         first.set();
310      });
311      indent--;
312      out.arrayEnd();
313   }
314}
